name: ndex-mcp
description: Connect Claude Desktop to NDEx to search, load, create, and manage biological networks using natural language.

NDEX_HOST.title: NDEx Host
NDEX_HOST.description: Hostname of the NDEx server. Use 'localhost' for a local Docker container.

NDEX_PORT.title: NDEx API Port
NDEX_PORT.description: The port the NDEx API server is listening on. Default is 8080.

NDEX_USERNAME.title: NDEx Username
NDEX_USERNAME.description: Your NDEx account username. Leave blank for anonymous read-only access to public networks.

NDEX_PASSWORD.title: NDEx Password
NDEX_PASSWORD.description: Your NDEx account password. Required for write operations and private network access.
